title: GetMessages
description: Action: `get_conversation_messages`. Retrieves a page of messages from the conversation attached to the given session. Results are ordered newest-first. Use `before` for cursor-based pagination. The server replies with an `immediate_response` event whose `data` matches the `Response` schema below.

Request.title: GetMessagesRequest
Request.description: Fields sent by the client to page through conversation history.

requestId.description: Client-generated correlation ID echoed back on all related events.

sessionId.description: Session ID whose conversation messages to fetch.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return per page. Must be 1–100; defaults to 50.

before.description: ISO 8601 cursor: return only messages created strictly before this timestamp. Omit to start from the most recent message.

Response.title: GetMessagesResponse
Response.description: Data payload carried in the `immediate_response` event.

messages.description: Ordered list of messages (newest-first up to `limit`).

hasMore.description: True if more messages exist before the oldest message in this page. Use the oldest `createdAt` as the next `before` cursor.

ConversationMessage.title: ConversationMessage
ConversationMessage.description: A single message as returned on the wire. This is a subset of the full `Message` domain object — it omits server-only fields (metadataJson, analyticsJson) and includes abbreviated participant descriptors.

direction.description: Message direction: `inbound` = from user, `outbound` = from agent.

content.description: Message payload. `text` contains the plain-text form; `structuredResponse` contains parsed agent output when present.

structuredResponse.description: Structured agent response (shape depends on agent template).

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the message was created.
